name: Publish brand-compliant Instagram posts from Google Sheets using AI

parameters.content:
## Publish Brand-Compliant Instagram Posts from Google Sheets Using AI

Reads your content calendar daily, generates brand-locked captions and visuals using AI, composites your logo dynamically, and publishes straight to Instagram — all without touching a design tool.

### How it works
1. Triggers daily, fetches your logo and master brand context file, then reads today's pending posts from Google Sheets.
2. Loops through each post in scheduled order, waiting until the exact post time before processing.
3. Generates a brand-compliant caption and a 1024×1024 AI image using your brand context. Calculates logo placement coordinates and composites your logo onto the final graphic.
4. Uploads the image to AWS S3, creates an Instagram media container via the Graph API, and publishes it live.
5. Writes the result back to your sheet — status, caption, image URL, or error message — then moves to the next post.

### Setup
1. Add credentials for Google Sheets (OAuth2), AWS IAM, Facebook Graph API, and OpenAI in n8n.
2. Open **Set Workflow Config** and paste your logo URL, Google Sheet URL, master context URL, S3 bucket name, and Instagram Business ID.
3. Host a raw text or .md file containing your brand rules and paste the direct link into `masterContextUrl`.
4. Set your preferred posting time in **Daily Schedule Trigger**.
5. Activate the workflow.

### Customization
- Swap models in **Generate Post Caption** and **Generate AI Image** to adjust quality and cost.
- Adjust logo dimensions in **Resize Logo Image** (default 170×130) to match your brand scale.
- Connect a Slack or Gmail node after **Format Error Alert** to get notified when a post fails.

## Trigger and Initial Configuration

Loads your brand config, fetches the logo, and downloads the master context file on a daily schedule.

## Post Retrieval and Filtering

Reads today's pending posts from your content calendar and stops cleanly if nothing is scheduled.

## Content Generation and Formatting

Generates captions and images using AI, then cleans and formats the data for further processing.

## Image Hosting and Preparation

Uploads the processed image to AWS S3 and prepares it for Instagram.

## Instagram Publishing

Creates a container on Instagram and publishes the post.

## Post Status Update

Updates the status of the post in Google Sheets as published or failed.

## Branching and Endings

Handles different scenarios such as no posts found, all posts processed, or errors.

nodes.name: Daily Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Initiates the workflow automatically on a daily schedule.

nodes.name: Fetch Brand Context
nodes.notes: Downloads the master brand context file to feed instructions and restrictions to the AI prompts.

nodes.name: If Context Exists
nodes.notes: Stops execution if the brand context URL returned no content.

nodes.name: Fetch Logo Image
nodes.notes: Fetches the raw company logo image file.

nodes.name: Resize Logo Image
nodes.notes: Resizes the company logo to fit within 170x130 while preserving its aspect ratio.

nodes.name: Read Instagram Posts
nodes.notes: Queries the content calendar to find any posts scheduled for today that are still marked as 'Pending'.

nodes.name: If Posts Pending
nodes.notes: Routes the workflow forward if there are pending posts, or halts if the list is empty.

nodes.name: Sort Posts by Time
nodes.notes: Orders the pending posts chronologically based on their scheduled execution time.

nodes.name: Loop Each Post
nodes.notes: Iterates through the sorted list of pending posts one by one.

nodes.name: Wait for Post Time
nodes.notes: Pauses the loop execution until the exact scheduled date and time for the current post.

nodes.name: Format Caption Data
nodes.notes: Parses the raw JSON string output from the LLM into structured data for downstream nodes.

nodes.name: Calculate Logo Position
nodes.notes: Calculates the dynamic X/Y placement coordinates for the logo based on the AI's layout decision.

nodes.name: Add Logo to Post
nodes.notes: Composites the resized brand logo onto the AI-generated image at the calculated coordinates.

nodes.name: Create Instagram Container
nodes.notes: Drafts the Instagram post via the Graph API using body parameters — required by Meta to correctly handle captions with emojis, hashtags, and line breaks.

nodes.name: Upload Image to S3
nodes.notes: Uploads the finalized composited image to AWS S3 to generate a public URL required by the Instagram API.

nodes.name: Publish Post to Instagram
nodes.notes: Triggers the final publish action for the created media container, pushing it live to the Instagram feed.

nodes.name: Update Post Status in Sheets
nodes.notes: Logs the post execution results back to the Google Sheet, including status, timestamp, final caption, and image URL.

value.Error Message: ={{ $json.publishError || $('Upload Image to S3').first()?.error?.message || $('Generate AI Image').first()?.error?.message || $('Generate Post Caption').first()?.error?.message || '' }}

nodes.name: Map Post and Logo Data
nodes.notes: Combines the downloaded AI image and the resized company logo into a single item for the composite node.

nodes.name: Handle No Posts Found
nodes.notes: Fallback path that gracefully stops execution and logs a message if there's no pending content.

nodes.name: Format Error Alert
nodes.notes: Connect a Slack, Gmail, or Teams node here to receive error notifications.

assignments.name: alertMessage
assignments.value:
=🚨 Workflow Failed | Node: {{ $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted }} | Error: {{ $json.error.message }}

(Route this to Slack, Teams, or Email)_

nodes.name: Handle Missing Context
nodes.notes: Fires when masterContextUrl returns no content. Halts execution with a clear diagnostic message.

assignments.name: error
assignments.value: Brand context URL returned empty or unreachable — check masterContextUrl in Set Config.

nodes.name: Handle All Posts Processed
nodes.notes: Terminal node for Loop out0. Provides a clean completion signal in the execution log.

assignments.name: batchComplete
assignments.value: All scheduled posts for today have been processed.

nodes.name: Set Published Status
nodes.notes: Stamps postStatus: Published before updating the Google Sheet.

nodes.name: Set Failed Status
nodes.notes: Captures the Publish to Instagram error and stamps postStatus: Failed before updating the Google Sheet.

assignments.name: publishError
assignments.value: ={{ $json.error?.message ?? 'Instagram publish call failed — check Graph API token and permissions.' }}

nodes.name: Set Workflow Config
nodes.notes: Initializes global configuration variables, including URLs for the logo, target Google Sheet, and brand master context.

textOptions.description: An Instagram post configuration containing the matched brand category, layout instructions, and the final optimized caption.

values.content:
You are a professional Instagram content writer. Follow the brand voice, tone, and industry context defined in the BRAND CONTEXT below.

CAPTION STRUCTURE (strictly follow this order, separate each section with \\n\\n): 
1. HOOK — one punchy opening line with 1 emoji 
2. BODY — 1–2 lines of value or detail with 1–2 emojis 
3. CTA — one action-oriented closing line aligned with the brand’s call-to-action style 
4. HASHTAGS — 5–7 hashtags on the last line  

CAPTION RULES: 
- Write in the language defined in the brand context (default: English) 
- 3–5 emojis max across the entire caption, placed naturally 
- Tone: follow the brand voice rules defined in the brand context 
- Follow all brand voice rules and avoid all prohibited phrases from brand context 
- The caption value must use the escaped sequence \\n (backslash + n), never a real line break character

nodes.name: Generate AI Image
nodes.notes: Prompts OpenAI's image generation model to create a 1024x1024 visual graphic matching the strict brand context and assigned layout.

parameters.prompt:
=You are a professional Instagram graphic designer. Follow all brand rules below strictly and without exception. These rules override any creative judgment.

Design a premium Instagram post using the full brand context provided below.

BRAND CONTEXT:
{{ $('Fetch Brand Context').first().json.data }}

CAMPAIGN DETAILS:
Topic: {{ $('Loop Each Post').item.json.Topic }}
Context / Objective: {{ $('Loop Each Post').item.json.Context }}

CLASSIFIED CATEGORY (already determined — do not reclassify):
Category: {{ $('Format Caption Data').item.json.category_letter }} — {{ $('Format Caption Data').item.json.category_name }}

INSTRUCTIONS:
Step 1: Read the topic and context carefully.
Step 2: The category has already been classified. Use ONLY the layout defined for Category {{ $('Format Caption Data').item.json.category_letter }} — {{ $('Format Caption Data').item.json.category_name }} from the brand context. Do not reclassify.
Step 3: Apply that category's layout strictly. Do not use any other layout.
Step 4: Follow all global brand rules strictly — colors, fonts, post style, tone, and language.
Step 5: Place the logo placeholder exactly at {{ $('Format Caption Data').item.json.logo_position }} as instructed in the category layout.

OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS:
- Premium, realistic, high-quality visual
- Soft lighting, clean spacing, polished composition
- Strictly follow Category {{ $('Format Caption Data').item.json.category_letter }} layout only
- Do not add any logo from your side
- Do not add any placeholder box, dotted border, dashed border, rounded rectangle, or any container marking the logo area
- Leave the logo safe zone as plain empty background only
- Do not mix layouts from different categories
- Do not use generic stock ad design
- The main canvas background must always remain white

nodes.name: Download AI Image
nodes.notes: Downloads the finalized image asset returned by OpenAI so it can be manipulated locally.

json.Context: Explain the benefits of our new telehealth platform. Highlight convenience, zero wait times, and safety while maintaining a professional, trusted tone. End with a CTA to book a virtual appointment.
